name: Sugared Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in the packed brown sugar until it is melted and well combined.
3. Add the pecan halves or pieces to the mixture.
4. Stir until all the pecans are evenly coated with the syrup.
5. (Can be used as a garnish for Pecan Pie)
